registryMode.description: Metric and algorithm configuration is driven by registry metadata and per-metric parameter resolution.

documentationCenter.description: In-app user, methods, diagnostics, limitations, and developer documentation with full-content search.

workflow.title: Importing Actigraphy Files
workflow.description: Upload one or more actigraphy recordings. Optional support and sensor files are added in their relevant later steps.

workflow.title: Pre-processing
workflow.description: Review or customize valid-day hours, consecutive-day requirements, sleep-window coverage, and non-wear handling.

workflow.title: Estimating Activity Metric
workflow.description: Choose how raw acceleration or device activity is converted into the epoch-level activity series used for analysis.

workflow.title: Activity Preview
workflow.description: Inspect the selected activity basis, dates, gaps, and recording structure before defining intervals.

workflow.title: Cleaning and Masking
workflow.description: Apply per-file start/stop limits, uploaded masks, detected non-wear, and custom plot-selected exclusions.

workflow.title: Sleep-wake Classification
workflow.description: Add sleep diaries or custom sleep windows and select the sleep/rest classification algorithm.

workflow.title: Other Sensors
workflow.description: Preview and configure light analysis; attach temperature or other sensor files for future support.

workflow.title: Analysis Set-up
workflow.description: Choose analysis families or individual metrics and configure their parameters.

workflow.title: Generate Results
workflow.description: Run the selected analyses and view results, plots, quality-control messages, CSV-ready tables, and JSON diagnostics.

workflow.title: Export Outputs
workflow.description: Download tables, plots, configuration, quality-control information, and diagnostic outputs.

activityMapping.title: 3. Estimating Activity Metric / Magnitude of Acceleration

sleepDiary.title: Sleep Diary and Custom Sleep Windows

uiText.maskingHelp: Masking excludes invalid or non-wear periods so they do not influence analysis.
uiText.diaryHelp: Sleep diary files contain reported sleep timing, naps, or in-bed intervals.
uiText.sstHelp: Start/stop files define the actual effective recording interval, such as when the device was really worn.
uiText.algorithmHelp: Sleep/rest algorithms classify the selected activity series and should be chosen before generating sleep-family metrics.
uiText.sleepCoverageHelp: Minimum sleep-window coverage is the proportion of expected epochs inside a sleep window that remain recorded and scorable after gaps, non-wear, and masks. Windows below the threshold are excluded from sleep summaries.
